summary: Parallel pwsh PID 26620 (started 2026-05-06 17:55:08 JST) is still alive at halt time with 13.78 CPU seconds, but has produced no new file writes in the 60-second observation window 18:05:58 - 18:06:58 JST. The folder mtime is stable at 18:04:08 (the adoption_audit.md write). This pattern (alive + non-zero CPU + no file output) is consistent with: (a) the agent running a long internal computation or LLM call between file writes; (b) the agent waiting on a tool call response; (c) the agent stalled on user-input prompt; (d) the agent having entered an extended reasoning phase before STEP 4 file writes.
interpretation: Most likely (a) or (b) — the parallel agent has just completed STEPS 1-3 (3 deliverables in folder match STEPS 1-3 outputs of relay 061) and is currently executing STEP 4 'Independent fresh-substrate sweep (depth probe)'. STEP 4 requires 3 of P1-P6 probes which involve file reads and reasoning, naturally producing a 5-15 minute gap before independent_depth_probe.md is written. This session does NOT have visibility into the parallel session's tool call queue.
decision: Did NOT terminate parallel pwsh PID 26620 (no operator authorization for parallel-process interruption). Did NOT race to produce an alternative LANE-2 deposit (would violate independence floor and bridge convention). Halt + surface to operator per HALT_061_DUPLICATE_LANE2.
monitoring_recommendation: Operator should check whether sessions/2026-05-06/T1-SYNTH-SUBSTITUTE-LANE2-051-Q1Q2Q4/ has new files (independent_depth_probe.md, lane2_six_item_verdict.md, lane2_meta_verdict.md, claims.jsonl, handoff.md, halt_log.json, discrepancy_log.json, unexpected_finds.json) within the next 30-60 minutes. If yes, parallel agent succeeded; ratify their deposit. If no, fire HALT_061_DUPLICATE_LANE2 option B (Stop-Process -Id 26620; archive partial deposit; re-dispatch to a fresh session).

addendum_at_2026_05_06T18_12_30_JST.summary: Re-checked LANE2 folder before bridge push. Parallel agent has produced 2 ADDITIONAL deliverables since the original 60s quiescence observation: independent_depth_probe.md 16698 B at 2026-05-06T18:08:40 (matches relay 061 STEP 4 output) and lane2_six_item_verdict.md 18890 B at 2026-05-06T18:11:53 (matches relay 061 STEP 5 output). pwsh PID 26620 CPU usage grew to 14.078 s, confirming the process is genuinely productive (not stalled). The earlier quiescence was interpretation (a) -- long internal LLM reasoning between STEP 3 and STEP 4 file writes -- not (c) stall or (d) deadlock.
addendum_at_2026_05_06T18_12_30_JST.implication_for_operator_options: Recommendation strongly UPGRADED to A_LET_PARALLEL_FINISH. At the production rate of ~1 deliverable per 3-4 minutes, the remaining 4 deliverables (lane2_meta_verdict.md + claims.jsonl + handoff.md + the 3 standard JSONs) should land within ~15-20 minutes from this addendum timestamp.
